GameLike.title: GameLike
GameLike.description: A record of a user liking a specific game to prevent duplicate likes and track user favorites

userId.description: The UID of the user who liked the game

gameId.description: The unique ID of the liked game

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the game was liked

GameStats.title: GameStats
GameStats.description: Statistics for a game, specifically tracking the real-time global likes count

gameId.description: The unique ID of the game

likesCount.description: Total number of users who liked this game

GameComment.title: GameComment
GameComment.description: A real-time user comment on a game

content.description: The cleaned/filtered text content of the comment

parentId.description: The document ID of the parent comment, or empty string if it is a top-level comment

/likes/{likeId}.description: Tracks which users liked which games using document ID pattern '{userId}_{gameId}'

/games/{gameId}.description: Stores aggregate statistics like real-time global likesCount for each game

/comments/{commentId}.description: Stores real-time user comments on games
